# Copilot Instructions (Repository Operations)

This instruction file applies to repository operation tasks.

## Scope

Use `.github/` documents when the task is about GitHub workflow or collaboration.

- Issue/PR lifecycle
- Branch protection and review policy
- Projects/Milestones management
- Actions/Dependabot/Environments operations

Use `docs/` when the task is about product implementation.

- Architecture and API behavior
- Service implementation
- Runtime/deployment behavior of the product itself

## Required Reading Order

1. `.github/00_START_HERE.md`
2. `.github/docs/GITHUB_FEATURES_GUIDE.md`
3. `.github/docs/BRANCH_PROTECTION_SETUP.md`

For implementation tasks, switch to `docs/00_START_HERE.md`.
